PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROJAS, WALTER ROJAS, BARBARA ROJAS, JOSHUA GARCIA, MARIA ROJAS, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, KIM PHANG THI $10,440.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,440.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- DEFENDANTS TO PAY PLAINTIFFS: $1840 TO WALTER ROJAS; $3000 TO MARIA GARCIA; $2500 TO BARBARA ROJAS; $2500 TO JOSHUA ROJAS; $600 TO DAVID ROJAS. COSTS TO PLAINTIFFS.
